rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the structural issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.1: No uncertainty is disclosed, as the recommendations are structural and verifiable against the artifact.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no scope drift or omission.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content, and identifies potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: No provenance or traceability is provided for the recommendations, as they are presented as direct suggestions without attribution.
